\tzpentry{ID5683}{Tachocline Shear Opposing Polarities Em Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5683 introduces Tachocline Shear Opposing Polarities Em Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\frac{\partial \Omega}{\partial r} \rightarrow \text{Tachocline shear} \Rightarrow \text{Opposing polarities} \\[1em] \textbf{09.} $
\]
